activated_rules.rule_name: EU-normalization for origins in Country of Origin

consignor.certificate_value: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB C/O Greencarrier AB Box 1076 40522, Göteborg Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB Torgny Segerstedtsgatan 80 Gothenburg 40522 Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB' from certificate found explicitly in invoice in header and address block with matching country Sweden after normalization, fulfilling 4.1.0 and 4.1.4. Differences in address details are allowed.

consignee.certificate_value: Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V. Prolongación 27 Calle, Contiguo a Z Astro Honduras, Co. Felipe Zelaya San Pedro Sula 21101 Honduras
consignee.invoice_value: Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V. Prolongación 27 Calle, Contiguo a Zona Libre Astro Honduras, Co. Felipe Zelaya San Pedro Sula 21101 Honduras
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' is explicitly stated in the invoice in both Invoice To and Consignee fields with matching country Honduras, confirming match under 4.2.0.2 priority and land verification 4.2.3.

goods_description.invoice_value: Testliner 2 BW 170gsm, RW 1300mm; Testliner 2 BW 170gsm, RW 1350mm; Testliner 2 BW 170gsm, RW 1450mm; Testliner 2 BW 170gsm, RW 1600mm; Testliner 2 BW 170gsm, RW 1700mm
goods_description.motivation: Goods description identifies 'Testliner' with HS code 4805 25 in certificate and invoice. Invoice contains several Testliner variants matching certificate description under allowed normalization without semantic interpretation, fulfilling 4.3.2 and 4.3.8.

quantity.motivation: Quantity 30 rolls matches exactly in both documents; weight 52.992 MT in certificate versus 55.348 MT in invoice. Weight difference is 4.43% (55.348 vs 52.992), exceeding ±0.1% tolerance. However, the system identifies MINST EN kvantitetsuppgift (rolls = 30) matched exactly, which suffices per 4.4.3.1 to establish MATCH on quantity. Weight difference ignored as per rules.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'EU Germany' is verified against invoice origin 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN. GERMANY'. EU-normalization rules applied allowing equivalence of 'EU' and specific member state Germany. Therefore, origin matches per 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla kontrollerade data i certifikatet kan entydigt verifieras i fakturan utan avvikelser eller tolkningar enligt fastställda regler.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan, och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
